---
title: Topics
---

Following topics will be covered in this training. The order and depth of topic may differ slightly depending on progress of participants.

### Module I

#### Getting Started With Interpreter
- Installation
- Interpreters / Jupyter

#### Calculating With Python
- Numbers 
- Text
- Collections
- Built ins

#### Programming Constructs
- Loops
- Conditions
- Functions

#### Puting it together
- Modules
- Scripts


### Module II

#### Working With Files
- Read/write text files
- shutils

#### Matter of Style
- List/Dictionary comprehensions
- Common iteration patterns
- Make a deck and shuffle it!

#### Data
- Tabular data
- Data Cleaning
- excel data

#### Problems from field
- Problems of participants' choice

### Module III

#### Object Oriented Programming
- Classes
- More 

#### Third Party Tools
- requests
- typer

#### Your choice
- topics as per requirements
